whySeparatePlans.title: Why separate plans
whySeparatePlans.highlightText: This way, your parents and family get the coverage that suits their needs best.

switchContext.titleForParents: Why parents are better covered separately
switchContext.titleForFamily: Why family is better covered separately

items.title: Premium depends on eldest member
items.description: When parents are included, the overall premium may increase for the family.

capturePincode.disclaimerContent: Aditya Birla Capital Digital Ltd (ABCDL) is a wholly owned subsidiary of Aditya Birla Capital Ltd. (ABCL). ABCD is a digital platform for financial services. Insurance is facilitated by ABCD and offered by the concerned insurer. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions, please read the sales brochure and policy documents carefully before concluding a sale.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Aditya Birla Capital Digital Ltd (ABCDL) is a Corporate Agent (IRDAI Reg No. CA0871) of Aditya Birla Health Insurance Co. Limited and does not underwrite the risk or act as an insurer. All health insurance products are underwritten by the Aditya Birla Health Insurance company and are subject to the terms and conditions of the relevant policy. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read terms and conditions and prospectus carefully before concluding a sale. Aditya Birla Capital Digital Ltd (ABCDL) having its Registered office at Aditya Birla Capital Digital Limited, 18th Floor, One World Center, Tower 1, Jupiter Mills Compound, 841 Senapati Bapat Marg, Elphinstone Road, Mumbai 400013. ABCDL is a Corporate Agent of Aditya Birla Health Insurance Co. Ltd (IRDAI Reg No:153)

addonsData.name: Preferred Provider Network
addonsData.description: Get access to preferred provider network benefits as defined in the policy terms.

addonsData.name: Room Rent Type
addonsData.description: Choose the room type for in-patient hospitalization.

addonsData.name: Tele OPD consultation
addonsData.description: Offers cover for tele-consultation from medical practitioners within ABHI network.

addonsData.name: Vaccine Cover
addonsData.description: Covers expenses for selected preventive vaccines.

addonsData.name: Critical Illness Cover
addonsData.description: Get lump sum payout as defined in the policy document if diagnosed with a listed critical illness.

addonsData.name: Personal Accident Cover
addonsData.description: Get financial protection against accidental death, permanent total disablement and permanent partial disability.

addonsData.name: Durable Equipment Cover
addonsData.description: Covers eligible durable medical equipment expenses as per policy terms.

addonsData.name: Second Medical Opinion for listed Major Illness per person
addonsData.description: Provides a second medical opinion for listed major illnesses.

addonsData.name: Annual Screening Package for Cancer Diagnosed Patients
addonsData.description: Adds an annual screening package for eligible cancer diagnosed patients.

addonsData.name: Compassionate Visit
addonsData.description: Covers eligible compassionate visit benefits as defined in the policy terms.

addonsData.name: Cancer Booster
addonsData.description: Adds extra protection for listed cancer-related benefits as per policy terms.

addonsData.name: Per Claim Deductible
addonsData.description: Applies the selected deductible at claim level as per policy terms.

addonsData.name: Chronic Care
addonsData.description: Get protection against listed chronic conditions from day one.

addonsData.name: Chronic Management Program (OPD)
addonsData.description: Adds OPD-based chronic condition management benefits for selected insured members.
